title: Local Tree Move Projection
summary: Feature parent for replacing the successful single-document move refresh with a committed local model and tree projection.
content_html:
Local Tree Move Projection

Purpose

Replace the routine full-index refresh after a successful single-document move with a local projection of the server's committed result.

This is a bounded, independent refactor with an immediate benefit: current drag/drop preserves the displayed document, unrelated nodes, expansion state, and other local context.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — the problem, intended result, and feature boundary.
  • Architecture — the server-commit, browser-model, and rendered-tree ownership model.
  • Delivery — the complete implementation and verification boundary.
  • Docs Viewer Roadmap — scheduling, dependencies, and suggested feature order.

Status

The feature is ready and not active. Its delivery is bounded and safe to implement independently. It does not add checkbox selection or group movement.

Durable Home

Docs Viewer Runtime will own the shipped execution path. Runtime Module Ownership changes only if implementation genuinely moves responsibility between runtime owners.
